BodyPilot Support

Last updated April 26, 2026

Use this page for account, privacy, coaching, billing, app recovery, and safety support.

General support Privacy request Account deletion help App recovery help

Before contacting support

  • For backups, open Settings, Data, then Export backup.
  • For account deletion, open Settings, Account or Settings, Privacy, then Delete account.
  • For notifications, open Settings, Notifications and review permission/channel state.
  • For a crash recovery issue, include the recovery ID shown by the app.

Health and emergency note

BodyPilot support cannot provide medical diagnosis, treatment, emergency guidance, or individualized medication or compound dosing advice. In an emergency, contact local emergency services.
